title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access Colossus, a major GPU cluster, revealing that Anthropic lacks vertical integration in chips and infrastructure compared to other frontier labs. The commentary argues this partnership affects Claude's reliability and rate limits, and suggests the AI race is shifting toward control of chips, energy, and datacenters rather than model benchmarks alone.
